texto: James would only look for music composed and performed by humans. Nowadays people didn’t feel the need to learn to play musical instruments. And why would they, since the sounds they produced could be perfectly generated digitally. Human voices were sample recorded, then modified and remastered by artificial intelligence. Where did our creativity go?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de A.V. Osten que provoca temas ligados a sabedoria. Ao questionar “James would only look for music composed and performed by humans. Nowadays people didn’t feel the…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre sabedoria, dogs-and-humans, dystopian, com foco em dystopian e sci-fi.
